title: mentha × carinthiaca var. submollis
intro: Mentha × carinthiaca var. submollis, also known as Bergamot mint, is a variety of mint that is a hybrid of Mentha aquatica and Mentha × carinthiaca, characterized by its distinctive fragrance and flavor. The medicinal properties of Bergamot mint include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, an antioxidant, and a natural analgesic, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bergamot mint include relieving stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and providing pain relief, among others. Bergamot mint can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its essential oil is also used in aromatherapy and cosmetics.
